ratings.comment: An amazing instructor. Always does his best to be inclusive and is very, very patient with his students.
He's super understanding and laid back, and makes class super fun! There are always a bunch of fun activities, and his methods of teaching really work. Super fun course and you learn so much.

Taylor Koss is one of the kindest people I have met. He treats each and every class, student, and topic with care. Also, he gives great insight on deaf culture as a deaf person himself. I always felt welcomed in his class, and excited to show up everyday!
